steps.t: Éomer's Vengeance can be found to the north-west of Eaworth, just outside the eaves of Fangorn. Éomer has said you should look for signs of your frien…
Uglúk and Éomer fought personally at the end of the battle, but Uglúk did not walk away.
The ground at Éomer's Vengeance is torn up by a confused muddle of footprints. Can anything be learned from it?
Corudan wishes to speak with you at Éomer's Vengeance. You have found a number of footprints that seem to go toward the Forest of Fangorn, and should …
Horn is waiting to speak with you at Éomer's Vengeance, north-west of Eaworth.
